name: The Crypts of Khar-Dhuum
author: System
description: A small introductory dungeon for 4-6 characters of levels 1-3. An ancient dwarven crypt has been disturbed, and the dead walk again.
setting: Underground crypt beneath an abandoned dwarven mine
introduction: The villagers of Millhaven have reported strange sounds from the old dwarven mines. Livestock has gone missing, and a shepherd swears he saw walking dead near the mine entrance at dusk. The village elder offers 500 gold pieces to any brave souls who will investigate and cleanse the threat.

rooms.name: Mine Entrance
rooms.description: A crumbling stone archway leads into darkness. Dwarven runes, badly worn, are carved above the entrance. A cold draft carries the scent of dust and decay.

contents.details: Broken mining equipment lies scattered about. A successful Search check (1 in 6) reveals a rusted but usable iron spike.

rooms.name: Guard Chamber
rooms.description: This room once served as a guard post. Stone benches line the walls, and rusted weapon racks stand empty. The air is stale.

rooms.name: Storage Room
rooms.description: Shelves line the walls of this small chamber, most bare or holding only dust. A few sealed clay jars remain intact.

trap.damage: 1d4 poison damage, save vs. Poison or additional 1d6
trap.detection: Find Traps or careful inspection (1 in 6)

rooms.name: Hall of the Dead
rooms.description: A long corridor lined with stone alcoves, each containing a dwarven sarcophagus. Faded murals depict dwarven warriors in battle. Several sarcophagi have been broken open from the inside.

contents.special: The zombies rise from the broken sarcophagi when the party reaches the middle of the hall. Surprise on 1-3 (d6).

rooms.name: The Defiled Shrine
rooms.description: This chamber was once a dwarven shrine to Moradin. The altar has been overturned and dark runes scrawled in dried blood cover the walls. A sickly green glow emanates from a cracked crystal set into the floor.

monsters.name: Khar-Dhuum the Wight
monsters.special: Energy drain: successful hit drains 1 level. Immune to sleep, charm, hold, cold. Silver or magic weapons to hit.

contents.special: Destroying the cracked crystal (AC 5, 10 HP) causes the remaining undead in the dungeon to collapse. The crystal radiates evil and necromantic magic.

rooms.name: Hidden Treasury
rooms.description: A small, dusty chamber hidden behind a secret door. Dwarven runes on the wall read 'For the faithful in times of need.' A stone chest sits in the center.

encounters.name: The Mine Entrance
encounters.read_aloud: The mine entrance yawns before you like the maw of some great beast. The dwarven runes above read, in Common, 'Here rest the honored dead of Clan Stoneshield.' A cold wind moans from within.

encounters.name: Zombie Ambush
encounters.read_aloud: As you pass between the broken sarcophagi, the sound of grinding stone fills the hall. Pale, rotting hands reach from the darkness of the alcoves as the dead rise to attack!

encounters.name: The Wight Lord
encounters.read_aloud: The green glow from the cracked crystal illuminates a horrific scene. Two emaciated, grey-skinned creatures crouch near the desecrated altar. Behind them, seated on the overturned altar like a throne, is a figure in corroded dwarven plate armor. Its eyes burn with cold, malevolent intelligence. 'You dare disturb the rest of Khar-Dhuum?' it rasps. 'Then join my army of the dead!'

rewards.story_reward: The village of Millhaven is grateful. Characters gain free room and board at the Millhaven Inn and a 10% discount at the general store.
